repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(webhooks): repair scoped child task sessions
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-112.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/79041 by @afurm. This repair keeps attribution for the original implementation while making the branch landable.

Plan:
- Rebase or refresh the contributor branch onto current main.
- Inspect the existing Codex review-bot comment and address or explicitly clear any actionable findings.
- Fix the failing check and check-test-types lanes without widening the webhooks surface.
- Run focused webhooks tests and pnpm check:changed.
- Run Codex /review and address findings before any merge recommendation.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/webhooks/index.test.ts extensions/webhooks/src/http.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for @afurm as the author of source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/79041.
If a replacement PR is opened instead of repairing the branch, include source PR attribution and credit in the PR body.
